title: Mango's Compat Delight
body:
🍋 Mango's Compat Delight

Enhancing Farmer’s Delight with better compatibility!
This lightweight mod focuses on smooth integration between popular mods to make your gameplay experience more seamless.

✅ Supported Features

- FTB Ultimine
  - Chain tilling support for Rich Soil
  - Harvesting support for Mushroom Colonies

Enjoy effortless farming and mod interactions with Mango's Compat Delight!
